Tactical Communication Directives

Instant VOIP dispatch links to structural protection nodes and tactical command vectors.

Trauma Paramedic Emergency Matrix

Routing Index: 911-MED-CORE

Fire Suppression Systems Branch

Routing Index: 911-FIRE-TACTICAL

Routing Index: 911-LEO-MATRIX
